fato_historico: 1935: The world's first parking meter is installed in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to pause and find your internal rhythm today. Much like the invention of the first meter to organize the bustling flow of urban streets, you may find that setting gentle boundaries helps your creative energy flourish. It is a good time to tidy your surroundings and invite a sense of peace into your sanctuary.
frase_do_dia: Peace flows when you allow your heart to find its natural steady beat.
significado_numero: A gentle vibration representing the awakening of your inner spiritual path.
conselho: Consider organizing your physical space to invite more clarity and mental calm today.
